ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the player */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the player */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Pre-existing medical conditions of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team is based in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player with the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return date based on recovery progress */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan assigned to the player */,
  "rehab_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rehabilitation process */,
  "rehab_end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the rehabilitation process */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member responsible for the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injury record being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the current status of the injury */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member who provided the update */,
  "rehab_progress" TEXT /* Progress in the rehabilitation process */,
  "next_appointment" TEXT /* Date of the next medical appointment or check-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_updates_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_id") REFERENCES injuries ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_updates_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the coach */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the coach */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the medical team (e.g., doctor, physiotherapist) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member serves */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the staff member */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the staff member */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Professional qualifications of the staff member */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player these statistics belong to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors made by the player */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the statistics were accumulated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rehab_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rehab assignment */,
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injury being rehabilitated */,
  "rehab_date" TEXT /* Date of the rehab assignment */,
  "rehab_location" TEXT /* Location where rehab is taking place */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member responsible for the rehab session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rehab session in minutes */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of rehab session (e.g., physical therapy, strength training) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rehab_assignments_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_id") REFERENCES injuries ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rehab_assignments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, coach, medical staff) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role in the system */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
